AcquisitionNotes: Ratings collected during a separate re-watch session outside the scanner; aligned to stimulus (movie) time. Each row spans from the previous rating timestamp (or 0 for the first) up to the current rating timestamp.

onset.Description: Start of the interval summarized by the rating (s from start of re-watch).

duration.Description: Length of the interval from previous rating to current rating.

valence.Description: Subjective valence rating (-5 very negative to +5 very positive).

arousal.Description: Subjective arousal rating (0 calm to 5 most aroused).

anxiety.Description: Subjective anxiety rating (0 none to 5 most anxious).
